findings.quote: Qualified: the writer grants the sea preserves best, yet finds that raising a wreck can be a defensible bargain.
findings.note: PARTIALLY/hedge-heuristic: author-attitude item where B is the only balanced stance among three absolute ones (Convinced/Dismissive/Detached). A test-wise reader leans to the qualified option blind (blind_pick B), but the three distractors are substantive authorial stances a passage could support, so form only leans and does not decide. Routed to adjudication, not killed.

findings.quote: Den bor provas kritiskt snarare an antingen dyrkas som ofelbar eller avfardas pa forhand.
findings.note: PARTIALLY/hedge-heuristic: attitude item where B is the only balanced stance among extremes (superstition-dismiss / wholly-reliable / heritage-regardless). Test-wise lean to B blind, but distractors are substantive stances so a passage still decides. blind_pick B. Routed to adjudication.

findings.quote: Igelkottarnas rundor tycktes bli langre och tatare dar staketen hade glipor, men bara nar flera lotter i rad var oppna.
findings.note: PARTIALLY: A reverses causation (hedgehog movement -> humans saw gaps) and D is method-as-result ('cameras can record night animals'); both eliminable by form. Leaves the qualified B vs the absolute C ('oavsett grannlotterna'); test-wise lean to conditional B but a passage decides B vs C. blind_pick B.

findings.quote: Att lotterna hanger ihop betyder mer for igelkotten an hur prydlig eller stokig den enskilda lotten ar.
findings.note: PARTIALLY: D is off-topic (why the hedgehog is threatened, not how to help it) and B is an overclaim ('sakraste sattet att radda'); both eliminable by form. Leaves A (single-factor absolute 'i sig den avgorande') vs the measured comparative C; lean C. blind_pick C. Routed to adjudication.

findings.quote: Att umganget avgor mer an skarmtiden, och att larmen om medievanor overdriver deras roll.
findings.note: PARTIALLY/hedge-heuristic: attitude item where B is the balanced thesis among extremes (media-main-cause / completely-unaffected / inevitable-leveling-by-depopulation). Test-wise lean to B blind, distractors are substantive stances so a passage still decides. blind_pick B.
